caption: A man with a tall, stylized gray wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a recording studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, with a background featuring various framed pictures and clothing on hangers. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" alongside "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man is seen talking, with his mouth opening and closing while he maintains a focused expression. The camera remains stationary, capturing a medium shot of the man from the chest up. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the clip, highlighting the textures of his attire and the surrounding studio environment.
